content.fact_text: Implemented complete, production-ready Zod validation schemas for inventory-related events (Reserved, Released, Adjusted, Snapshot) and application configuration. Includes custom error handling and PII redaction utilities.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides centralized, type-safe Zod validation schemas for inventory event payloads and application configuration, including domain invariant enforcement for stock levels.
provenance_data.utility: Provides type-safe, validated data contracts for the Inventory service, preventing malformed data from propagating through the event-driven architecture and enforcing business invariants at the edge.
